question: Based on the chart of daily website visitors over a recent two‑week period, which statement about visitor totals over time is most accurate?

options.A: Visitor totals were higher during the later part of the period than during the earlier part.
options.B: Visitor totals were higher during the earlier part of the period than during the later part.
options.C: Visitor totals were exactly the same in the earlier and later parts of the period.
options.D: It is not possible to compare totals between different parts of the period from this chart.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
